totals.cash_gap_resolution: €1500 equipment deposit now funded (2026-04-12). Remaining gap of €1500 to be covered by Early Bird ticket revenue or additional sponsorship.

equipment_package.description: Sound + lights + DJ gear (CDJs, mixer, monitors, lighting rig)

artists_guaranteed.note: Verify exact split vs the €1500 Tiago mentioned verbally

artist_bonus_pool.description: €100 success bonus to each of 6 artists if event goes well (Tiago excluded)

marketing_team.description: Two local women handling social content + photography

permit_and_insurance.description: Handled via Duas Igrejas parish umbrella

stage_structure.description: Stage itself — separate from equipment package

bar.description: Handled entirely by Duas Igrejas parish — they keep all bar profits

wristbands_scanning.description: Wristbands for age control + QR scanning (Shotgun app)

misc_contingency.description: Van fuel, last-minute purchases, decor materials (logo, props)

income_projections.note: Assumes 70% sellthrough as baseline when reporting. Headline target 1000 = aspirational.

critical_cashflow_note: Shotgun pays out ~24h after event ends. All pre-event costs (€2725) must come from cash-in-hand (€5000) + first sponsor/supporter contributions. Cash-in-hand currently covers this comfortably.
